title: Channel 4 Rolls out AI-driven tool to open TV advertising to SMEs - CSI Magazine
text:
Channel 4 Rolls out AI-driven tool to open TV advertising to SMEs
By CSI
17/11/2025
Channel 4 Sales has introduced Smart Ad Engine, a GenAI-powered service designed to make TV advertising accessible to small and medium-sized businesses. The tool allows SMEs to create tailored, indicative TV ad concepts in minutes using their existing online and social content, helping them visualise how TV could elevate their brand.
The free service serves as a gateway to a range of paid options, including full campaign management, creative development and Clearcast submission, with Channel 4 ensuring that all final output meets UK broadcast advertising standards. The initiative is aimed particularly at brands advertising on TV for the first time, combining AI with human-led creative oversight to deliver high-quality, compliant commercial content.
Smart Ad Engine supports a streamlined production process backed by Channel 4 personnel and clear creative workflows, helping businesses produce TV-ready ads that meet both Clearcast rules and Channel 4’s own creative and ethical criteria, the broadcaster said. The launch forms part of Channel 4’s Fast Forward strategy to broaden digital advertising opportunities and lower traditional barriers such as production cost and creative resourcing.
Sam Hicks, Head of Advertiser Strategy, Channel 4, said: “Smart Ad Engine is about unlocking opportunity for SMEs, giving all businesses the tools to compete with bigger enterprises. Backed by TV’s unrivalled reach and viewer trust, allied to AI-powered automation, Smart Ad Engine will enable all businesses to visualise impactful, compliant and responsible advertising.”
